title: Skill
description: An Agent Skill — SKILL.md content plus optional adjacent files.

name.description: Skill slug (kebab-case). Becomes the directory name in target client output.

description.description: One-line description used by the agent to decide when to invoke the skill.

allowed_tools.description: Tools the skill is permitted to invoke. May be dropped on adapters that lack the field.

files.description: Paths to additional files in the skill directory, relative to the skill root.
